title: Annuity Transaction Status
content: View high-level transaction status updates without logging in, or log in for full details on pending and completed transactions. Annuities Customer Service mail: P.O. Box 7960, Philadelphia, PA 19176. For overnight mail: 160 Malone St., Millville, NJ 08332. Use the Annuities Virtual Chat Assistant on prudential.com for quick help.
agentNotes: Fortitude Re customers are serviced by Prudential as third-party administrator — same annuity resources apply.

title: Annuity Customer Support
content: For annuity questions, use the Annuities Virtual Chat Assistant on Prudential's website or contact the Annuities Service Center. Business hours for phone support are typically weekdays 8 AM to 6 PM ET. Have your contract number ready.
agentNotes: Separate workflow from life insurance — confirm product type first.
